packageRules.description: cargo-cooldown-check: custom hermit source, point Renovate at its index release
Extra cooldown for majors (matches Dependabot semver-major-days: 30)

ariadne: skip the 0.3–0.6 range — the 0.6 rewrite was deferred; post-0.6 releases contain the fixes needed to migrate, so allow those through. Also keep 0.2.x patches open since that's the currently pinned branch.
tree-sitter-solidity: manual bumps only — would affect bencher benchmark data, upgrade deliberately
toml: hold below 0.9 — 0.9 / 1.0 not yet adopted
@types/node: no automatic major bumps — Node majors are upgraded manually and only to even LTS releases (e.g. 24 → 26). Minor/patch within the current major flow through normally.
solar: manual bumps only — benchmark dep, upgrades must be coordinated with bencher baselines
iai-callgrind: disabled pending migration to gungraun (issue #1690); crate was renamed upstream
tree-sitter: manual bumps only — same benchmark-stability concern as tree-sitter-solidity; runtime changes can shift bencher numbers
cargo: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
npm: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
pip (Pipenv): group minor/patch; majors stay individual
hermit (toolchain): group minor/patch; majors stay individual
dockerfile: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
Allow vulnerability fix PRs for benchmark-adjacent deps that are otherwise set to enabled: false
